◎简　　介  

　　The orginal Debbie does Dallas was about a young lady becoming sexually mature. In this sequel after quitting her job as a Dallas cheerleader she visits her aunt's home. She quickly discovers her aunt runs a brothel, and Debbie becomes a working girl.
